title: It Begins with You
author: Jillian Turecki
subline: The 9 hard truths about love that will change your life.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A single PERSON silhouette in the center. Surrounding the figure: 9 thin concentric rings — the '9 hard truths' radiating outward. The outermost ring is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1280)" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
    <!-- 9 concentric rings, increasing radius, fading opacity from center out -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="100" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="160" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.85"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="220" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.75"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="280" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.65"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="340" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.55"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="400" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="460" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.45"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="520" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.4"/>
    <!-- 9th ring — RED, 2.5px, the outer boundary -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="580" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <!-- A person silhouette at the center, drawn in white 3px -->
    <g stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3" fill="none">
      <circle cx="0" cy="-100" r="22"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-78" x2="0" y2="40"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-50" x2="-40" y2="-20"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-50" x2="40" y2="-20"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="-22" y2="80"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="40" x2="22" y2="80"/>
    </g>
    <!-- A red heart-shaped dot at the figure's chest -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="-10" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Number labels for the 9 rings, on the right side -->
    <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="10" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="0" y="-95">1</text>
      <text x="0" y="-155">2</text>
      <text x="0" y="-215">3</text>
      <text x="0" y="-275">4</text>
      <text x="0" y="-335">5</text>
      <text x="0" y="-395">6</text>
      <text x="0" y="-455">7</text>
      <text x="0" y="-515">8</text>
      <text x="0" y="-575" fill="#fc1c46">9</text>
    </g>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: The book's argument: self-love precedes all other love. A solitary person silhouette stands at the center, surrounded by 9 concentric rings (the 9 hard truths) — 8 in ash fading in opacity, the 9th (outermost) in RED 2.5px. A small red dot at the figure's chest marks the heart. Title sits overlaid on top of the figure, weight 300 whisper, mixed-case. Brand '9 TRUTHS' in the bottom-right; pill '1/9' anchors the bottom — the first truth, the one that starts with the self.
